sources.pitRule: WHERE date <= asOfDate; both are YYYYMMDD strings; lexicographic comparison is sufficient because format is zero-padded. Applied in AsOfDataGate.buildWhereClause().
sources.coverageWindow: Full TWSE/TPEX trading history available; minimum 20 days required for MA20
sources.freshnessRule: Sourced from TWSE OpenAPI / twstock Python; updated daily after market close
knownLimitations: PIT gate relies on string comparison; timezone edge (market close = 13:30 Asia/Taipei) not yet formally encoded
No formal walk-forward calibration of technical indicator PIT safety
Minimum 20 days needed; < 20 triggers missingSources=[StockQuote（不足 20 天）]
sources.allowedWhenMissing: Return early from scoring; set scoringAvailable=false; alphaScore=0; researchBucket=Neutral
sources.fallbackBehavior: Abort scoring with EMPTY completeness status
sources.forbiddenBehavior: Must NOT use any quote with date > asOfDate. Must NOT infer prices from future data.
sources.pitValidationNote: NEEDS_VALIDATION — PIT gate is implemented but not formally back-tested for edge cases (split dates, holiday adjustments)

sources.pitRule: detectRegime(asOf) reads TAIEX (0050 proxy) quotes with date <= asOfDate only. Regime classification and confidence are functions of historical quotes up to asOfDate.
sources.coverageWindow: TAIEX quote history; confidence increases with more history
sources.freshnessRule: Recomputed on each scoring call; no cache needed if asOf is fixed
knownLimitations: Unknown regime still grants partial score credit (5 of 20 pts) rather than 0 — conservative design choice
Regime classification algorithm not formally audited for Taiwan market cycles
No regime-specific walk-forward calibration yet
sources.allowedWhenMissing: Score with reduced regime weight (5 pts); continue scoring without regime adjustment
sources.fallbackBehavior: Use Unknown regime; scale adjustment to 0 in SignalFusionEngine; continue
sources.forbiddenBehavior: Must NOT look ahead to future TAIEX prices. Must NOT use regime computed after asOfDate.
sources.pitValidationNote: NEEDS_VALIDATION — regime engine PIT safety is structurally correct but not formally audited

sources.pitRule: WHERE date <= asOfDate (YYYYMMDD string). Net 10-day foreign + investment trust + dealer flow computed from available days up to asOfDate.
sources.coverageWindow: TWSE T+1 disclosure; data available for most listed stocks
sources.freshnessRule: TWSE discloses institutional chip the next trading day; delay of 1 day is by design
knownLimitations: Missing chip sets missingSources=[InstitutionalChip] and chipScore=0 with weight redistribution
Only net-10d aggregate exposed in factorSnapshot; individual daily records not in renderer output
ETFs may have different chip disclosure patterns
sources.allowedWhenMissing: Set chipScore=0; redistribute chip weight to technical in SignalFusionEngine
sources.fallbackBehavior: Score with chipScore=0 and weight redistribution; continue
sources.forbiddenBehavior: Must NOT use chip data from dates after asOfDate. Must NOT impute chip from future filings.
sources.pitValidationNote: NEEDS_VALIDATION — PIT gate implemented but not formally back-tested for T+1 lag edge cases

sources.pitRule: WHERE releaseDate <= asOfDate. If releaseDate is null and allowInferredReleaseDate=true, infer as 10th of following month (INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH). Applied in filterMonthlyRevenueAvailableAsOf().
sources.coverageWindow: DB has 2143 rows; months available = 2026-02 and 2026-03 only. Historical 2025-09 to 2026-01 NOT YET ACQUIRED.
sources.freshnessRule: TWSE discloses MonthlyRevenue by 10th of following month. releaseDate is that disclosure date.
sources.sourceGatedNote: Although PIT gate is repaired (P17/P24/P25), the historical source files for 2025-09 to 2026-01 have not been acquired from TWSE/MOPS. P26F4 is WAITING_FOR_OPERATOR_SOURCE.
knownLimitations: 2025-09 to 2026-01 historical data missing → P3/P19 corpus rows have missingSources=[MonthlyRevenue]
YoY computation requires >= 13 months; most current DB rows insufficient for YoY
All 2143 rows use INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH as releaseDateSource
sources.allowedWhenMissing: Set missingSources=[MonthlyRevenue]; set fundamental weight=0 in SignalFusionEngine; continue scoring with technical/chip/regime
sources.fallbackBehavior: Redistribute fundamental weight to remaining active sources; note in factorSnapshot as '月營收：資料暫缺'
sources.forbiddenBehavior: Must NOT use MonthlyRevenue rows with releaseDate > asOfDate. Must NOT fabricate revenue data. Must NOT import without P26F4 approval token.
pitRepairHistory: P17-HARDRESET: releaseDate column added and helper implemented
P24-HARDRESET: production migration executed; 2143 rows backfilled

sources.pitRule: NOT IMPLEMENTED. Would require availabilityDate (= filingDate on TWSE) <= asOfDate. periodEndDate and fiscalQuarter are NOT valid PIT gate fields.
sources.coverageWindow: Unknown — no systematic source acquisition plan yet
sources.freshnessRule: Unknown — TWSE filing calendar varies by report type
knownLimitations: No availabilityDate governance in current Prisma schema
P26C drafted availabilityDate contract v0 (paper design only)
Real source is manual TWSE; no automated ingestion
Risk of look-ahead contamination if periodEndDate is used as gate
sources.allowedWhenMissing: Continue scoring without FinancialReport. It is not currently used.
sources.fallbackBehavior: No fallback needed; source is not in scoring path
sources.forbiddenBehavior: Must NOT enter alphaScore until sourceStatus = AVAILABLE_PIT_SAFE. Must NOT use periodEndDate or fiscalQuarter as PIT gate. Must NOT be activated without explicit contract update.
activationRequirements: Implement availabilityDate field in FinancialReport DB schema
Backfill availabilityDate from TWSE filingDate records
Add to P12 v2 contract with pitStatus=REPAIRED
Update this registry entry to REPAIRED_BUT_SOURCE_GATED or AVAILABLE_PIT_SAFE

sources.pitRule: Must gate by publishedAt <= asOfDate (Asia/Taipei end-of-day). ingestedAt is NOT a valid PIT gate. P26B contract v0 established this rule but real PIT-safe source is not yet verified.
sources.coverageWindow: RSS/Cnyes events available in DB but publishedAt reliability not audited
sources.freshnessRule: publishedAt sourced from news feed; may default to ingest time if not available
knownLimitations: publishedAt may default to ingest time when feed does not provide timestamp
Mock events mixed with RSS events in live path
No real source with verified PIT-safe publishedAt for all events
ingestedAt is always FORBIDDEN as PIT gate — it reflects system ingestion, not event publication time
sources.allowedWhenMissing: Continue without news context. No scoring impact.
sources.fallbackBehavior: Omit news context from snapshot; no scoring change
sources.forbiddenBehavior: Must NOT enter alphaScore. Must NOT use ingestedAt as PIT gate. Must NOT treat mock events as real events for scoring.
activationRequirements: Audit publishedAt reliability across all RSS/Cnyes sources
Separate mock events from real events at DB level
Verify publishedAt <= asOfDate gate for all event queries

nextSteps: P29-B: NewsEvent / FinancialReport Real Source Acquisition Plan
P29-C: Backtest / Simulation Contract Paper Design
Future P30: formal PIT gate validation for TWSE_TPEX_Quote / MarketRegime / InstitutionalChip to move status → AVAILABLE_PIT_SAFE
disclaimer: Paper design. Registry v1 is not consumed by any production scoring path. Not investment advice.
